LanguageData.FC_VATS_Attack.label: V.A.T.S.
LanguageData.FCP_Ability_Burner.label: Fire Breath
LanguageData.FCP_Ability_Deathclaw_ChameleonCloak.des: The deathclaw uses its natural camouflage abilities to blend into its surroundings, becoming nearly invisible to enemies.
LanguageData.FCP_Ability_Nightstalker_ShadowCloak.des: The nightstalker uses its natural stealth abilities to become nearly invisible, striking from the shadows.
